---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, a new workflow rule, or an enhancement to existing behavior.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<Concrete description of the problem you encountered. Avoid abstract framing; use a real example from your work.>

## Why existing commands or rules don't solve it

<Have you tried `what-next`, `im-stuck`, or relevant phase commands? Why are they insufficient?>

## Proposed solution (optional)

<If you have an initial proposal, describe it. Otherwise leave blank.>

## Type of change

- [ ] New command (under `commands/`)
- [ ] New rule or section in `WORKFLOW_OPERATING_SYSTEM.md`
- [ ] Enhancement to existing command
- [ ] New template (under `templates/`)
- [ ] Sync script feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Use case

<Describe the engineering scenario where this would help. The more specific, the better.>

## Alternatives considered

<Any workarounds you tried, or other approaches you rejected and why.>

## Compatibility implications

- [ ] This is a non-breaking addition.
- [ ] This may break existing tasks (explain below).
- [ ] This requires migration of existing `TASK_STATE.md` files (explain below).

## Additional context

<Any other context: similar features in other tools, references, or considerations.>

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the project's design principles in `WORKFLOW_OPERATING_SYSTEM.md`.
- [ ] I understand this project follows a strict, evidence-driven, low-assumption design and proposals that contradict that philosophy may be declined.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions for similar proposals.
